title: Stainless Steel BBQ Sausage Holder, Creative Standing Man Sausage Barbecue Rack, Portable Hot Dog Roaster Rack, Spoof The Sausages Rack for Outdoor Camping Cooking Accessories (4pcs)
features: Interesting Design: This hot dog grill features a fun and unique design where it stands on the grill, puts the hot dogs on the pegs and hangs them over the grill while they cook for you. It will make everyone say o-uh when they see it and adds a touch of fun to your barbecue party. It will also make your guests laugh.

Portable and Convenient: The stainless steel grill sausage holder is designed to be portable so you can enjoy delicious grilled sausages anywhere. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it easy to carry and store.

Versatile Grilling Accessory: This hot dog rack is not only perfect for grilling sausages, but can also be used to cook other foods such as kebabs, vegetables or even marshmallows. Its versatility allows you to experiment with different flavors and recipes, making every grilling session exciting and delicious.

Easy to Use and Clean - To use, just put the sausage on the pegs and put the whole sausage on the grill. To facilitate your outdoor use, we use stainless steel material which is easy to clean. Ideal for family dinners, barbecues, picnics, camping and outdoor travel. It is also suitable as a marshmallow toaster as well as sausage and kebabs.
PERFECT GIFT: A great humorous gift for a friend, family member or work colleague, this sausage holder is sure to get a few giggles and will come in handy when grilling season starts.
description: Specification: Product Name: Stainless Steel BBQ Sausage Holder Material: Stainless Steel Color: As shown Size: 7.5x11.5x21cm/2.95x4.53x8.27in Package include: 1/2/4pcs* Stainless Steel BBQ Sausage Holder Notes 1.
